# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading `backgroundJobs101` solution from .NET 9 to .NET 10 using the All-at-Once strategy. 1 project targeted with one API compatibility fix required.

**Progress**: 2/3 tasks complete (67%) ![67%](https://progress-bar.xyz/67)

## Tasks

- ✅ 01-sdk-validation: Validate .NET 10 SDK Installation
- ✅ 02-upgrade-api: Upgrade API Project to net10.0
- 🔄 03-test-and-commit: Validate and Commit
